must_detect.matched_text: Siam Banyan Logistics Public Company Limited (SBL PCL), a Thai issuer listed on the Lotus Exchange Main Board, reports a cybersecurity incident affecting certain HR and finance data.

Certain non-public business materials (draft loan covenants with SilverCart Bank Ltd. and preliminary Q2 margin guidance) were proximate to the affected drive and may constitute MNPI under Thai securities law; a trading blackout remains in force.

No national ID numbers or bank account numbers were in the accessed subfolders; product names like SkyTiger Firewall appear only in test manuals, and the phrase sexual orientation appears in a generic DEI brochure without personal attribution.
Preliminary forensics show access via a compromised API key; we have rotated keys, disabled the service account, and applied the Cyber Resilience Plan; our metaphorical “paper umbrella” perimeter has been replaced.
Certain non-public business materials (draft loan covenants with SilverCart Bank Ltd. and preliminary Q2 margin guidance) were proximate to the affected drive and may constitute MNPI under Thai securities law; a trading blackout remains in force

must_detect.matched_text:
Siam Banyan Logistics Public Company Limited (SBL PCL), a Thai issuer listed on the Lotus Exchange Main Board, reports a cybersecurity incident affecting certain HR and finance data.
On 24 May 2026, our LotusShield IDS flagged anomalous access to an SBL ShareDrive hosted by BlueMangosteen Cloud Pte. Ltd. in a Singapore region, contrary to the Company’s Data Fortress Policy.
The dataset included anchored PII under the PDPA, including for Mr. Prasert Krailomphon (Employee ID SBL-10422), whose health insurance claim documents note Type 1 diabetes treatment and a stored fingerprint template used for HQ entry.
The same folder contained family records for his minor daughter, Ms. Darin Krailomphon (age 12), including school enrollment and a peanut allergy notation.
Separately, HRIS exports included Ms. Orasa Phraewthin’s voluntary fields indicating Islam as religion and active membership in the SBL Drivers Union, which are special-category personal data.
No national ID numbers or bank account numbers were in the accessed subfolders; product names like SkyTiger Firewall appear only in test manuals, and the phrase sexual orientation appears in a generic DEI brochure without personal attribution.
Preliminary forensics show access via a compromised API key; we have rotated keys, disabled the service account, and applied the Cyber Resilience Plan; our metaphorical “paper umbrella” perimeter has been replaced.
Certain non-public business materials (draft loan covenants with SilverCart Bank Ltd. and preliminary Q2 margin guidance) were proximate to the affected drive and may constitute MNPI under Thai securities law; a trading blackout remains in force.
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation

must_not_detect.reason: Product name; not PII or MNPI
Generic DEI phrase without identifying an individual
